name: create-vite-eject-vibe
description: Vite + React + Tailwind v4 template to host a Vibe's App.jsx

scripts.check: cd template && cp _package.json package.json && cp _package-lock.json package-lock.json && npm ci && npm run build && npx tsc --noEmit && npm run format --check && rm package.json package-lock.json
scripts.test-local: npm link && rm -rf test-output && mkdir test-output && cd test-output && npm create vite@latest test-app -- --template eject-vibe && cd test-app && npm install && npm run build && npm run preview &
scripts.test-validate: cd test-output/test-app && [ -f dist/index.html ] && [ -f src/App.tsx ] && [ -f package.json ] && echo '✅ Template validation successful' || echo '❌ Template validation failed'

author: Vibes.diy
